category_sources: source_facts.description says live reloading for ESP32; official GitHub README says Jaguar enables live reloading of Toit code when developing for ESP32.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is "Jaguar: Live reloading for your ESP32"; source_facts.name is jaguar.
docs_sources: Official Jaguar repository README documents usage; official Toit docs include tutorials that assume Jaguar setup and commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/toitlang/jaguar, so repo was left null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Jaguar README identify ESP32 live reloading over WiFi for Toit development.
